title: SHC Cape collection
description: Add a bunch of capes for your character!
body:
With this part of the pack you can obtain +20 capes!
 
For obtain any cape you only need to rename a paper with one of these names:

Millionth cape

Birthday cape

Realms mapmaker cape

Snowman cape

Turtle cape

Cake cape

Obsidian cape

Iron cape

Diamond cape

Emerald cape

Minecon 2015 cape

Minecon 2011 cape

Mojang cape

dB cape

Translator chinese cape

Minecon 2013 cape

Minecon 2012 cape

Slime cape

Egg turtle cape

Bamboo cape


Bell cape

Snow cape

Candy cane cape

Strong duck cape

Gingerbread cape


Bat cape

Mummy cape

Zombie cape

Eye cape

Cauldron cape
